# Test fixtures

ODM v2.0 example files from the official CDISC repository
(https://github.com/cdisc-org/DataExchange-ODM, MIT license), vendored
unmodified for parser conformance testing:

- `cdisc-demographics-race.xml` — examples/Demographics_RACE
- `cdisc-cdash-mh.xml` — examples/Repeating_ItemGroup_CDASH_1-1_…_CRF
